description: Independent shared DAO Origin Signature conformance vectors.

oracle_provenance.generator_command: cd python && uv run --extra dev python ../test/vectors/generate_dao_origin_signature.py

vectors.name: valid_d0_self_128
vectors.description: Canonical D=0 self /128 DAO using receiver DODAG context.

vectors.name: reject_source_mutation
vectors.description: Changing source without re-signing is rejected.

vectors.name: reject_dodag_mutation
vectors.description: Changing dodag without re-signing is rejected.

vectors.name: reject_instance_mutation
vectors.description: Changing instance without re-signing is rejected.

vectors.name: reject_dao_sequence_mutation
vectors.description: Changing DAOSeq without re-signing is rejected.

vectors.name: reject_target_mutation
vectors.description: Changing target without re-signing is rejected.

vectors.name: reject_parent_mutation
vectors.description: Changing parent without re-signing is rejected.

vectors.name: reject_path_sequence_mutation
vectors.description: Changing Path Sequence without re-signing is rejected.

vectors.name: reject_lifetime_mutation
vectors.description: Changing lifetime without re-signing is rejected.

vectors.name: reject_order_mutation
vectors.description: Changing option order without re-signing is rejected.
